_comment: SHA-256 manifest for ML model assets that mneme bootstrap downloads from Hugging Face. These are static — bumped only when we replace a model file upstream — so they live in source instead of being computed in the release workflow. The release-checksums.json generation step in .github/workflows/multi-arch-release.yml merges this file's `files` map into the binary-artifact entries before publishing. Bug #32 (2026-05-07): without these, every install printed 5 'no pinned SHA-256' WARNs and skipped integrity verification on 3.5 GB of downloaded weights.
